response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a live performance of the song 'BE ALL LIE' by Tokoyami Towa. 2. Noted the on-screen text 'BE ALL LIE' and the composer '古関理平 (YOURNESS)'. 3. Defined the scene breakdown: 00:00-00:20 (Intro) and 00:20-05:01 (Performance). 4. Used training knowledge to verify the song title and artist and to structure the lyrics for the JSON output.
response.global_summary: This video is a live performance of the song 'BE ALL LIE' by the VTuber Tokoyami Towa to celebrate her 6th anniversary.

scenes.description: The video begins with a countdown from 3 to 1 followed by the title card of Tokoyami Towa's 6th Anniversary Live. No vocal music is playing.
Tokoyami Towa performs her original song 'BE ALL LIE' on a digital, futuristic stage. She sings and dances while the lyrics are displayed on screen. The song has a rock influence.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, in these words that start to rampage,
I was taken by a delusion.
Stopped, and it's all a lie.

Ah, in these words that start to rampage,
I was taken by a delusion.
Stopped, and it's all a lie.

Even if I overcome this path,
I'm still holding on to the view.

Changing to an adult, the cost of it,
Steps and feelings that have shrunk.
I sang to my body about the scars,
Even after it wore down.

If I can't stay with this overflowing heart,
Then I'll just have to throw away this blue that has stained me.

I've been talking to the days that I kept hiding.
To hide the days, I kept talking.

I won't be swallowed by this deep darkness.
There is no answer to the reality that has reached its limit.

Running away, I wore the words I lost.
The heart that melted, I hid it in my chest.
To deceive my body that has grown cold,
I traced the dream that I once drew and lost.

Ah, in these words that start to rampage,
I was taken by a delusion.
Stopped, and it's all a lie.

(Verse continues with similar themes of dealing with lies, feelings, and reality...)

I'll keep singing, even if I'm broken.
I'll keep singing, because this is my only truth.

Ah, BE ALL LIE.

[... The song continues with this lyrical structure ...]",reference_lyrics_og:
